see sb doing sth.example: I saw him doing sth kind by helping the old man cross the street.
see sb doing sth.exampleCn: 我看见他正在做善事，帮助老人过马路。

run away.example: The dog tried to run away when it heard the loud thunder.
run away.exampleCn: 狗听到响雷时试图逃跑。

feel uneasy.example: I feel uneasy when I have to speak in front of strangers.
feel uneasy.exampleCn: 当我必须在陌生人面前讲话时，我感到不安。

have one's own idea.example: A good leader should have one's own idea but also listen to others.
have one's own idea.exampleCn: 一个好的领导应该有自己的想法，但也要倾听他人。

There must be.example: There must be a reason why she was late for school today.
There must be.exampleCn: 她今天上学迟到一定有原因。

There be.example: There be many beautiful flowers in the garden after the rain.
There be.exampleCn: 雨后花园里有许多美丽的花。

in one's neighborhood.example: There is a small library in one's neighborhood that I visit often.
in one's neighborhood.exampleCn: 我住的小区里有一个我经常去的小图书馆。

have no idea.example: I have no idea how to solve this math problem; it is too hard.
have no idea.exampleCn: 我不知道怎么解这道数学题，它太难了。

have fun doing sth.example: We always have fun doing sth creative in our art class.
have fun doing sth.exampleCn: 我们在美术课上总是很开心地做有创意的事情。

too much.example: Eating too much candy is bad for your teeth and health.
too much.exampleCn: 吃太多糖果对你的牙齿和健康有害。

create fear.example: Dark stories can create fear in young children's minds.
create fear.exampleCn: 黑暗的故事会在幼儿心中制造恐惧。

in the laboratory.example: Students must wear safety glasses in the laboratory at all times.
in the laboratory.exampleCn: 学生在实验室必须始终佩戴安全眼镜。

think of doing sth.example: Have you ever thought of doing sth meaningful for your community?
think of doing sth.exampleCn: 你有没有想过为你的社区做一些有意义的事情？

take a shower.example: I always take a shower after playing basketball with my friends.
take a shower.exampleCn: 和朋友打完篮球后，我总是洗个澡。

cough a lot.example: If you cough a lot, you should drink warm water and rest.
cough a lot.exampleCn: 如果你严重咳嗽，应该喝温水并休息。

look like.example: You look like your mother when she was young.
look like.exampleCn: 你看起来像你妈妈年轻时的样子。

be late for.example: Try not to be late for class; it shows respect for your teacher.
be late for.exampleCn: 尽量不要上课迟到，这表示对老师的尊重。

not only.example: Not only did she win the race, but she also broke the record.
not only.exampleCn: 她不仅赢得了比赛，还打破了记录。

see the sun rising.example: Early morning hikers love to see the sun rising over the mountains.
see the sun rising.exampleCn: 清晨的徒步爱好者喜欢看太阳从山上升起。

communicate with.example: Learning to communicate with others is an important life skill.
communicate with.exampleCn: 学会与他人交流是一项重要的生活技能。

point out.example: The teacher kindly pointed out the mistakes in my essay.
point out.exampleCn: 老师友善地指出了我文章中的错误。

in a certain way.example: Everyone sees the world in a certain way based on their experience.
in a certain way.exampleCn: 每个人都根据自己的经验以某种方式看待世界。

move up.example: The hot air balloon began to move up slowly into the sky.
move up.exampleCn: 热气球开始慢慢向天空上升。

celebrate a victory.example: The whole team gathered to celebrate a victory after the match.
celebrate a victory.exampleCn: 比赛结束后，整个团队聚在一起庆祝胜利。

a long period of time.example: It takes a long period of time to master a foreign language well.
a long period of time.exampleCn: 掌握一门外语需要很长一段时间。

a group of.example: A group of volunteers cleaned the riverbank last Saturday.
a group of.exampleCn: 一群志愿者上周六清理了河岸。

picnic.example: We had a lovely picnic under the big tree by the lake.
picnic.exampleCn: 我们在湖边的大树下进行了一次愉快的野餐。

scare sb.to death.example: The sudden thunder scared me to death last night.
scare sb.to death.exampleCn: 昨晚突然的雷声吓死我了。

have cold feet.example: He had cold feet before the speech but did a great job.
have cold feet.exampleCn: 演讲前他临阵胆怯了，但表现得很棒。

prefer.example: I prefer reading books at home to watching TV all day.
prefer.exampleCn: 与整天看电视相比，我更喜欢在家读书。

electronic.example: Electronic devices make our lives more convenient but also more complex.
electronic.exampleCn: 电子设备让我们的生活更方便，但也更复杂。

director.example: The famous director spent three years making this historical film.
director.exampleCn: 这位著名导演花了三年时间制作这部历史电影。

dialog.example: Practicing dialog with a partner improves speaking skills quickly.
dialog.exampleCn: 与搭档练习对话可以快速提高口语技能。

plenty.example: There is plenty of sunshine in Yunnan throughout the year.
plenty.exampleCn: 云南全年都有充足的阳光。

sense.example: A good leader has a strong sense of responsibility toward the team.
sense.exampleCn: 一个好的领导对团队有强烈的责任感。

perform.example: The students will perform a play about Chinese history next week.
perform.exampleCn: 学生们下周将表演一部关于中国历史的戏剧。

recall.example: I can still recall the beautiful sunset over Erhai Lake.
recall.exampleCn: 我仍然能回忆起洱海上美丽的日落。

reflect.example: The still water reflects the mountains like a perfect mirror.
reflect.exampleCn: 平静的水面像一面完美的镜子反映着群山。

lyrics n.pl.example: The lyrics of this song tell a touching story about home.
lyrics n.pl.exampleCn: 这首歌的歌词讲述了一个关于家的感人故事。

suppose.example: I suppose the meeting will finish before lunch today.
suppose.exampleCn: 我猜想会议今天会在午饭前结束。

smooth.example: Her smooth voice made everyone in the room feel calm.
smooth.exampleCn: 她悦耳的声音让房间里的每个人都感到平静。

stick.example: Please stick the photo on the wall above your desk.
stick.exampleCn: 请把照片贴在你桌子上方的墙上。

ending.example: The happy ending of the story brought tears to my eyes.
ending.exampleCn: 故事的欢乐结局让我热泪盈眶。

documentary.example: We watched a documentary about wild animals in Africa.
documentary.exampleCn: 我们观看了一部关于非洲野生动物的纪录片。

drama.example: The school drama club puts on a new play every semester.
drama.exampleCn: 学校戏剧社每学期都会上演一部新戏。

intelligent.example: Dolphins are considered one of the most intelligent animals on Earth.
intelligent.exampleCn: 海豚被认为是地球上最聪明的动物之一。

sadness.example: Time does not remove sadness, but it helps us learn to carry it.
sadness.exampleCn: 时间不能消除悲伤，但它帮助我们学会承受。

pain.example: The pain of losing a friend taught me to value every moment.
pain.exampleCn: 失去朋友的痛苦教会我珍惜每一刻。

pity.example: It is a pity that we missed the beautiful flower festival this year.
pity.exampleCn: 遗憾的是我们今年错过了美丽的花节。

total.example: The total cost of the school trip was less than we expected.
total.exampleCn: 学校旅行的总费用比我们预期的要少。

master.example: The old master taught his students with great patience and wisdom.
master.exampleCn: 这位老大师以极大的耐心和智慧教导他的学生。

wound.example: Kind words can heal a wound that medicine cannot touch.
wound.exampleCn: 善良的话语可以治愈药物无法触及的伤口。

in that case.example: In that case, we should start preparing for the exam right now.
in that case.exampleCn: 既然那样，我们应该马上开始准备考试。

stick to.example: If you stick to your goals, you will eventually reach them.
stick to.exampleCn: 如果你坚持你的目标，你最终会达到它们。

plenty of.example: There are plenty of opportunities for young people in our city.
plenty of.exampleCn: 我们城市有大量年轻人的机会。

shut off.example: Please shut off the lights when you leave the classroom.

once in a while.example: Once in a while, it is good to take a break from studying.
once in a while.exampleCn: 偶尔，从学习中休息一下是好的。

in total.example: In total, fifty students joined the volunteer activity.
in total.exampleCn: 总共，五十名学生参加了志愿活动。

provide sb with sth.example: The school provides students with free books and learning tools.
provide sb with sth.exampleCn: 学校为学生提供免费的书籍和学习工具。

sing along with.example: Everyone loves to sing along with their favorite songs at the party.
sing along with.exampleCn: 每个人都喜欢在聚会上跟着他们最喜欢的歌一起唱。

dance to.example: The children happily dance to the lively music in the square.
dance to.exampleCn: 孩子们在广场上欢快地跟着活泼的音乐跳舞。

feel like.example: I feel like going for a walk after dinner tonight.
feel like.exampleCn: 今晚晚饭后我想去散步。

cheer up.example: A warm hug from a friend can cheer up anyone who feels sad.
cheer up.exampleCn: 朋友温暖的拥抱可以让任何感到悲伤的人振作起来。

meanings: 尽某人最大努力做某事
try one's best to do.example: No matter the result, always try your best to do everything well.
try one's best to do.exampleCn: 无论结果如何，总是要尽最大努力做好每件事。

Spare.example: Can you spare a few minutes to help me with this problem?
Spare.exampleCn: 你能抽出几分钟帮我解决这个问题吗？

Shut down.example: The old factory had to shut down because of environmental rules.
Shut down.exampleCn: 由于环保法规，这家旧工厂不得不关闭。

marry sb to sb.example: In the old story, the king wanted to marry his daughter to a brave knight.
marry sb to sb.exampleCn: 在古老的故事中，国王想把他的女儿嫁给一位勇敢的骑士。

custom.example: Respecting local custom shows that you value the host culture.
custom.exampleCn: 尊重当地风俗表明你重视主人的文化。

value.example: We should value the time we spend with our family and friends.
value.exampleCn: 我们应该珍视与家人和朋友共度的时光。

passport.example: You need a passport to travel to foreign countries.
passport.exampleCn: 你需要护照去外国旅行。

northern.example: The northern part of China gets very cold in winter.
northern.exampleCn: 中国北方冬天非常寒冷。

manner.example: Good manner means being polite and respectful to everyone.
manner.exampleCn: 良好的礼仪意味着对每个人都礼貌和尊重。

suggestion.example: Thank you for your suggestion; it really helped improve my essay.
suggestion.exampleCn: 谢谢你的建议，它真的帮助改进了我的文章。

greet.example: It is polite to greet your teachers when you see them at school.
greet.exampleCn: 在学校见到老师时打招呼是有礼貌的。

relaxed.example: I feel relaxed when I listen to soft music after a busy day.
relaxed.exampleCn: 忙碌一天后听轻柔的音乐让我感到放松。

capital.example: Beijing is the capital of China and also its cultural center.
capital.exampleCn: 北京是中国的首都，也是它的文化中心。

effort.example: Success comes from continuous effort, not just good luck.
effort.exampleCn: 成功来自持续的努力，而不仅仅是好运。

coast.example: The coast of Hainan attracts millions of tourists every year.
coast.exampleCn: 海南的海岸每年吸引数百万游客。

eastern.example: The eastern coastline of China is famous for its seafood.
eastern.exampleCn: 中国东部海岸线以其海鲜而闻名。

worth.example: This book is worth reading because it teaches valuable life lessons.
worth.exampleCn: 这本书值得一读，因为它教授了宝贵的人生课程。
